title: MGP Adapter Manifest
description: Self-description document for an adapter that exposes a backend through MGP.

backend_kind.description: Backend category such as vector_db, graph_db, file, api, or in_memory.

mgp_version.description: MGP specification version supported by the adapter.

supported_memory_types.description: Memory object types supported by the adapter.

supported_scopes.description: Memory scopes supported by the adapter.

supported_candidate_kinds.description: Memory candidate kinds that this adapter or gateway can accept and map.

default_prompt_view.description: Preferred default prompt-safe rendering mode for this adapter.

extension_namespaces.description: Namespace prefixes understood by this adapter.
